title: sagina nodosa subsp. nodosa
intro: Sagina nodosa subsp. nodosa, also known as nodding pearlwort, is a perennial plant species in the caryophyllaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of sagina nodosa subsp. nodosa include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of nodding pearlwort include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
